panels.description: Medium shot of the Time Traveller in a desolate, smoking forest clearing, looking down at his empty hands, weary expression, ashes swirling in the air.

bubbles.text: No traces of Weena. At least her body was spared the horror of the forest.

panels.description: Wide landscape shot from a hillock looking out over a hazy, ruined landscape, the Palace of Green Porcelain visible in the distance through smoke.

bubbles.text: The hillock was an island in the smoke. I could finally see the path to the White Sphinx.

panels.description: Medium shot of the Time Traveller, foot wrapped in grass, limping painfully across smoldering ground, expression of intense grief and exhaustion.

bubbles.text: I was utterly spent. The silence of the forest felt like a physical weight.

panels.description: Medium shot of the Time Traveller sitting on the yellow metal bench, looking at the idyllic river scene, a bitter, hollow smile on his face.

bubbles.text: I laughed at my own arrogance. I once thought this was paradise.

panels.description: Wide, panoramic shot of the beautiful landscape marred by the dark, ominous cupolas leading to the Underworld. High angle, emphasizing the futility of this 'utopia'.

bubbles.text: Humanity had committed suicide. It chose comfort over survival, and this was the end of that dream.
